assumptions: The developer is testing a US integration where a PayPal Developer account is documented as sufficient for sandbox.
No Developer Dashboard session or REST app credentials exist yet.
Live go-live and non-US testing that require a Business account are out of scope unless selected.

developer_goal: Create or sign in to a PayPal Developer account, obtain sandbox REST credentials, and complete the earliest official authenticated first success.

first_success.outcome: GET /v1/invoicing/invoices on the sandbox REST host returns an authenticated HTTP success response using the bearer access token.
first_success.observable_signal: The sandbox REST API accepts Authorization: Bearer ACCESS-TOKEN and returns HTTP 2xx JSON.

route_selection.surface: PayPal Developer Dashboard plus REST Get Started docs
route_selection.rule: Prefer routes without Business-account entitlement when US sandbox testing is allowed. Do not invent a winner among token-only versus first product API outcomes.

candidates.name: Own credentials: Default Application then sandbox OAuth token via cURL
candidates.reason: Matches the numbered Get Started path, but signup field inventory and secret-reveal UI remain unverified.

candidates.name: Own credentials: Create App then sandbox OAuth token
candidates.reason: Docs allow Create App instead of Default Application; action count may differ by one create step.

candidates.name: Postman without a PayPal Developer account
candidates.reason: Official Get Started states REST APIs can be tried in Postman without a Developer account, conflicting with an account-creation boundary.

candidates.name: Continue past token into Orders, Payments, Subscriptions, Invoicing, or Disputes
candidates.reason: Get Started lists these products without selecting one post-token first business result.

required_path.action: Log in to the Developer Dashboard or sign up for a PayPal Developer account.

required_fields.label: PayPal account signup or login fields
required_fields.notes: Docs link log in or sign up and mention email verification for new developer accounts, but do not enumerate current screens.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open Apps & Credentials.

required_path.action: Open Apps & Credentials and copy the sandbox client ID and client secret for Default Application or a newly created app.

required_fields.label: Client secret
required_fields.notes: Whether a reveal click is required is not documented.

required_path.observable_result: Sandbox REST credentials are available for the token request.

required_path.action: Exchange client ID and client secret for a sandbox OAuth 2.0 access token.
required_path.observable_result: PayPal returns access_token, token_type Bearer, and expires_in.

required_path.action: Call GET /v1/invoicing/invoices on the sandbox host with Authorization Bearer access_token.
required_path.observable_result: PayPal returns an authenticated invoices response.

prerequisites.description: US sandbox testing is documented as available with a Developer account; non-US testing and going live require a Business account.

external_gates.description: A PayPal Business account is required to go live or to test integrations outside the US.
New developer accounts may require responding to a PayPal verification email before sandbox tools are enabled.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email verification may delay Dashboard enablement after signup.

platform_outcomes.description: New accounts receive a Default Application in REST API apps and default personal plus business sandbox accounts.
The OAuth token endpoint returns a bearer access token for subsequent REST calls.

excluded.item: Sandbox buyer/seller login exercises after the token response
excluded.reason: Get sandbox account credentials is documented after token acquisition and is not required to observe access_token.

excluded.item: Live Apps & Credentials and go-live Business account setup
excluded.reason: Live entitlement is an explicit later gate beyond US sandbox first success.

sources.title: Get Started with PayPal REST APIs
evidence_supported: Business account for live and non-US

uncertainties.question: What exact screens, fields, and verification challenges occur during PayPal Developer signup today?
uncertainties.impact: Account-step field counts and possible identity gates cannot be verified from public docs alone.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account signup walkthrough of developer.paypal.com.

uncertainties.question: Is first success the OAuth access token, or the first product API after the token?
uncertainties.impact: Orders, payments, subscriptions, invoicing, and disputes each add different payloads and actors.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one bounded terminal outcome for the corpus.

uncertainties.question: Does the Postman-without-account route invalidate an account-creation starting boundary for PayPal?
uncertainties.impact: If allowed, the measured path may exclude Developer account creation entirely.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Policy decision on whether account-less Postman is in scope for this atlas journey.
